Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log with three cases We need to identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case and rename them to reflect their context

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets list all activities per case and see which ones recur within the same case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: So the activities that recur within the same case are Verify Documents in C001 and C003 twice each Call Customer in C002 twice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to rename these to reflect their context

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First occurrence Agent checks identity documents Second occurrence Agent re checks documents now that ID scan is provided So the first is an initial verification the second is a re verification after additional documents are submitted

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First occurrence Physical verification of ID Second occurrence Re verify docs after account adjustment Again first is initial verification second is re verification after an adjustment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First occurrence Outbound call to clarify account discrepancy Second occurrence Follow up call to confirm adjustments made So the first call is for clarification the second is a follow up call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now note that Verify Documents also appears once in C002 but only once so we do not need to disambiguate within that case

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: However to maintain consistency across cases we might consider whether we want to standardize the naming for similar contexts

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The problem says Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case so we only need to disambiguate within a case

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can rename them as Initial Document Verification and Document Re verification for both cases Clarification Call and Follow up Call for the two customer calls

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The task is specifically about activities that appear multiple times within the same case So we only need to disambiguate when there are multiple occurrences in the same case

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Consistency is good Lets use for first occurrence of Verify Documents in a case Initial Document Verification and for second occurrence Document Re verification

Name: Validation - PE
Text: These renamings disambiguate the recurring activities within each case making the process flow clearer
